title: Eva Kids
wikitext:
[]: Eva Kids             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sat May 16, 2009 10:03 pm If the cast of Eva had children (besides the ones that already did) what would they look like? Imagine Shinji and Asuka having kids. That would turn ugly but fast .

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat May 16, 2009 10:18 pm I'm remember seeing a picture of them having a child. In Girl Friend of Steel 2, Rei and Shinji both have a kid at the end of the game.

[]: Re: Eva Kids             Quote Post by Baz » Sat May 16, 2009 11:14 pm CyberXIII wrote: That would turn ugly but fast.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 16, 2009 11:20 pm Guyver Spawn wrote: In Girl Friend of Steel 2, Rei and Shinji both have a kid at the end of the game.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat May 16, 2009 11:32 pm Most of the pictures I've seen of Asuka and Shinji with kids have been very cute. I think they'd make some very beautiful babies. If they only had one kid, I think it'd be a son with red hair. If they had mutliple kids though, I think it'd be twins, a boy and a girl, both with red hair. Asuka's gotta spread around that ginger. For some reason when I imagine Misato having a kid with Kaji, I imagine a little kid with 3-day stubble and droopy eyes. Not pretty. On the other hand, if Misato had a kid with Makoto, I think they'd turn out really cute. Maybe a little girl who looks like Misato, but with glasses, and possibly black hair (and glasses on girls are cute). Point is, Misato is better off with Makoto than Kaji, because he'd give her a much cuter kid. Toji and Hikari would probably have a decent kid. Not really much to say beyond that since they're both pretty straight-laced in terms of appearance. Not really much to say other than that I imagine Hikari would probably want two or three kids, and they'd probably all have dark brownish hair like their parents. Supposedly Shigeru Aoba was fond of Maya. They probably could have some good looking kids, but it'd only work if Maya can somehow get over that girl crush she's got on Ritsuko. If the requirements are met, I think they'd have a boy with long moppy hair like Shigeru's. Oh yeah, and here's the kid you'd get if Fuyutsuki shacked up with Yui: [url]http://img40.imageshack.us/img40/9300/shinji048.jpg[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 16, 2009 11:35 pm Timstuff wrote: Oh yeah, and here's the kid you'd get if Fuyutsuki shacked up with Yui

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sat May 16, 2009 11:42 pm Shinji has always looked a lot more like Yui to me than Gendo, since I've never really seen much of Gendo in him. I don't seriously believe Fuyutsuki was Shinji's father, but the possibility has been a source of amusement for me for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sat May 16, 2009 11:47 pm Timstuff wrote: Shinji has always looked a lot more like Yui to me than Gendo,

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sat May 16, 2009 11:48 pm Yes to Asuka/Shinji kids

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun May 17, 2009 12:27 am Alaska Slim wrote: Timstuff wrote: Shinji has always looked a lot more like Yui to me than Gendo,

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun May 17, 2009 12:40 am Timstuff wrote: I dunno... I think Shinji takes after Yui a lot more,

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun May 17, 2009 1:01 am Alaska Slim wrote: Timstuff wrote: I dunno... I think Shinji takes after Yui a lot more,

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 17, 2009 1:05 am Timstuff wrote: In most images I've seen, Yui has blue/cobolt eyes too.

[]:             Quote Post by PuppetChaos » Sun May 17, 2009 1:22 am Shinji and Asuka's kids could potentially become a menace to the entire universe if they inherit even half of the psychological issues both of their parents have. (and if Asuka is clinically bipolar in addition to being simply messed up, well... poor kids) Also, I could never see Asuka taking Shinji's name, unless it was like "Asuka Langely-Ikari" ... and Shinji would have to become a Langely-Ikari, too. -- I always thought the College-Age Gendo looked like an older Shinji with a narrower face. But this also ties into my demented assertion that Shinji, given enough time and lack of 3rd Impact, will become a mini-Gendo. Timstuff wrote: Supposedly Shigeru Aoba was fond of Maya. [edit for length] but it'd only work if Maya can somehow get over that girl crush she's got on Ritsuko.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun May 17, 2009 1:39 am Well then it looks Alaska Slim and me were both wrong. However, eye color amongst parents of mixed eye color is pretty unpredictable. If Yui has a recessive blue-eyed gene and a dominant green eyed gene, and Kozo has a recessive blue eye gene and a dominant brown eye gene, then if Shinji were to inherit the recessive blue eye gene from both parents he'd have blue eyes. Granted, the fact that Gendo has blue eyes does give him a boost over Kozo, but it doesn't rule Kozo out. ;) And that's not even taking into consideration that all of these characters are supposed to be Japanese, in which case the only eye color they would likely have in reality would be brown. PuppetChaos wrote: Also, I could never see Asuka taking Shinji's name, unless it was like "Asuka Langely-Ikari" ... and Shinji would have to become a Langely-Ikari, too.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 17, 2009 2:36 am Timstuff wrote: In general though, there's a lot of stuff about Shinji's face that looks like Yui's, but not a lot that resembles his father, whichever man it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 17, 2009 2:39 am Timstuff wrote: If they only had one kid, I think it'd be a son with red hair. If they had mutliple kids though, I think it'd be twins, a boy and a girl, both with red hair.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun May 17, 2009 3:12 am Reichu wrote: Timstuff wrote: In general though, there's a lot of stuff about Shinji's face that looks like Yui's, but not a lot that resembles his father, whichever man it is.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Sun May 17, 2009 3:52 am PuppetChaos wrote: I always thought the College-Age Gendo looked like an older Shinji with a narrower face. But this also ties into my demented assertion that Shinji, given enough time and lack of 3rd Impact, will become a mini-Gendo.

[]:             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Sun May 17, 2009 4:02 am Timstuff wrote: Well then it looks Alaska Slim and me were both wrong.
